name: Women Lie Better
overview: Marta will meet a charming and rich man, but love will blind her eyes and Marta will not notice the true intentions of her new sweetheart behind her rose-colored glasses.

trailers.title: Ieva Kerēvica & Igo - "Meitenes vēl pasakām tic" (Seriāls Viņas melo labāk) (Official audio)
